Common Questions

What people ask us

Honest answers before you book.

How much does window cleaning cost?

+

Pricing depends on the number of windows, accessibility, and services required. We offer free, no-obligation quotes — call or message anytime.

Do I need to be home?

+

For exterior-only cleans, no. For interior access we'll arrange a time that suits you.

Are you insured and police cleared?

+

Yes — fully insured and police cleared. We take the safety and security of your home seriously.

Can you remove bore water stains?

+

Yes. We specialise in bore water and mineral stain removal — common across Perth properties. Just mention it when you enquire.

Do you offer regular schedules?

+

Absolutely. Monthly, quarterly, or bi-annual — we set it up and remind you. Priority booking for regular clients.
